routes.description: Current implemented path to WFO / Inversion / Interfered / Outro.
actions: WFO actions / Distributed Array until 100 Relative Momentum
routes.why_slow: After WFO, current relative_momentum generation uses small WFO basic values plus Distributed Array +60, so Inversion usually needs extra WFO actions. Conservative GP routing also does not auto-grant Optimal Solution.

routes.description: Shortest source-backed route to WFO using baseline core.
actions: 强化重击 (enter 30s 观测状态, clear core)
routes.estimated_combat_time: under 10s based on source action end frames

routes.description: Shortest source-backed route to Observation Marker.
actions: Generate enough special resource / 相对动能
routes.estimated_combat_time: not fully provable under 10s from source without resolving WFO resource interpretation and route constraints

routes.description: Shortest source-backed route to Interfered Marker.
unresolved_conditions: Requires 观测标记 + 偏移状态 + 谐度破坏伤害; current audit does not prove a complete deterministic route.

routes.description: Shortest source-backed route to full Concerto / Outro.
unresolved_conditions: QTE row and passive text disagree on Concerto amount; full Concerto route needs reviewed source calculation.

answers.excel_supports_under_10s_mornye_cycle: WFO entry under 10s appears source-backed. Full Interfered Marker or Outro cycle under 10s is not proven by this audit.
answers.why_current_route_takes_around_20s: Current route requires accumulating 100 Relative Momentum after WFO through implemented WFO gains and Distributed Array, and optional Interfered Marker is tied to Inversion. Conservative Expectation Error routing does not shortcut to Optimal Solution.
answers.current_20s_source_supported: source_partial for current implemented route; likely incomplete for full Mornye mechanics because Interfered Marker/Tune routes are unresolved.
answers.sub_10s_source_backed_route_found: Yes for WFO entry only; no for full Interfered Marker or Outro route.
